problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
